scripts.validate: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/cli && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/cli -- validate loj.project.yaml
scripts.build:generated: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/cli && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/cli -- build loj.project.yaml
scripts.validate:postgres: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/cli && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/cli -- validate loj.postgres.project.yaml
scripts.build:generated:postgres: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/cli && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/cli -- build loj.postgres.project.yaml
scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/cli && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/cli -- dev loj.project.yaml
scripts.record:e2e: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/cli && LOJ_E2E_RECORD_VIDEO=1 LOJ_E2E_ARTIFACT_DIR=.artifacts/local-e2e node e2e.mjs
scripts.validate:fastapi: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/cli && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/cli -- validate loj.fastapi.project.yaml
scripts.build:generated:fastapi: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/cli && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/cli -- build loj.fastapi.project.yaml
scripts.validate:fastapi:postgres: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/cli && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/cli -- validate loj.fastapi.postgres.project.yaml
scripts.build:generated:fastapi:postgres: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/cli && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/cli -- build loj.fastapi.postgres.project.yaml
scripts.dev:fastapi: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/cli && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/cli -- dev loj.fastapi.project.yaml
scripts.e2e:fastapi: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/cli && LOJ_PROJECT_FILE=loj.fastapi.project.yaml node e2e.mjs
scripts.record:e2e:fastapi: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/cli && LOJ_PROJECT_FILE=loj.fastapi.project.yaml LOJ_E2E_RECORD_VIDEO=1 LOJ_E2E_ARTIFACT_DIR=.artifacts/local-e2e-fastapi node e2e.mjs
scripts.proof: npm run validate && npm run build:generated && npm run typecheck:generated:frontend && npm run validate:fastapi && npm run build:generated:fastapi && npm run typecheck:generated:frontend && npm run measure:escape
